title: Article: Lessons from Adopting SwiftUI in an App with 50 Million Users
summary: Most SwiftUI educational content focuses on small projects and sample apps that do not explain what it means to adopt it in a 50 million user app developed by a team of 20+ iOS engineers. This article will attempt to fill this gap. and show how to succeed without breaking your team, your app, or your users' trust along the way. By Jimit Patel
